name: Stray
visualHook: Tactical gear with Lattice sigil abstracted to 'corporate sports team.' Helmet optional; eyes always read tired — true believer in procedure.
roleInPlot: Episode 6: attacks Glitch's safehouse — forces first full team-up. Henchmen-heavy; Stray is the voice yelling orders through smoke.
outcome: Tactical loss — team wins messy. Stray extracted by protocol; leaves behind evidence that Lattice has scale.
